steps.title: Find the needed verb
steps.content: The subject is the International Criminal Police Organization, or Interpol, a singular organization. The blank must provide the sentence's main verb before the object, offices in more than 200 cities.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: A is an infinitive, C is a present participle, and D is a perfect participle. None can serve as the main verb by itself. The singular present-tense verb supplies a complete predicate that agrees with Interpol. The answer is B.
